title: Shane Kenward
extract: Shane Kenward (born 7 March 1972) is a former professional rugby league footballer who played in the 1990s and 2000s. He played at club level for the Canberra Raiders, Gold Coast Chargers, St. George Dragons, Salford City Reds, Wakefield Trinity Wildcats, and the North Queensland Cowboys, as a fullback, centre, five-eighth or prop.
